title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Erra Epic (Full)
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Erra Epic (Full).
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Erra Epic (Full).

translation.text: From 'The Erra Epic (Full)': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
